all.en: Rachel was heading to Iceland for a long-awaited photography workshop in autumn.
all.zh: 瑞秋正前往冰島，參加一場期盼已久的秋季攝影工作坊。

all.en: Her connecting flight in Amsterdam was delayed by eight hours due to heavy fog.
all.zh: 她在阿姆斯特丹的轉機航班因濃霧而延誤了八個小時。

all.en: She sighed and looked for an empty seat near a charging outlet at the gate.
all.zh: 她嘆了口氣，在登機門附近尋找靠近充電插座的空位。

all.en: An older man with a tweed jacket asked politely if the seat beside him was free.
all.zh: 一位穿著粗呢外套的長者禮貌地詢問他身旁的座位是否有人。

all.en: His name was Henrik and he was a retired marine biologist from Norway.
all.zh: 他名叫亨利克，是位來自挪威的退休海洋生物學家。

all.en: He carried a worn leather notebook full of sketches of fish and coastal birds.
all.zh: 他帶著一本磨損的皮革筆記本，裡頭滿是魚類與海鳥的素描。

all.en: Rachel showed him her camera and the landscape photos she had taken in Taiwan.
all.zh: 瑞秋給他看自己的相機，以及她在台灣拍攝的風景照。

all.en: He admired her shot of a misty tea plantation in the early morning light.
all.zh: 他讚賞她那張清晨光線下煙霧繚繞的茶園照片。

all.en: They talked for hours about whales, glaciers, the northern lights, and family.
all.zh: 他們暢談了好幾個小時，聊鯨魚、冰河、北極光與家人。

all.en: Henrik mentioned that his wife had passed away two winters ago after a long illness.
all.zh: 亨利克提到他的妻子在兩個冬天前因長期病痛過世。

all.en: He was traveling alone this time because she had always loved Reykjavik in fall.
all.zh: 這次他獨自旅行，因為他的妻子一直深愛雷克雅維克的秋天。

all.en: Rachel listened quietly and offered him a piece of pineapple cake from her bag.
all.zh: 瑞秋靜靜聆聽，並從包包裡拿出一塊鳳梨酥請他吃。

all.en: He laughed at the sweetness and said it reminded him of childhood summer fruit.
all.zh: 他被那甜味逗笑，說這讓他想起童年時夏天的水果。

all.en: When the airline announced another two hour delay, they decided to find dinner.
all.zh: 航空公司宣布再延誤兩小時後，他們決定一起去找晚餐。

all.en: They shared a plate of Dutch pancakes and watched planes take off in the rain.
all.zh: 他們共享一盤荷蘭鬆餅，看著飛機在雨中起飛。

all.en: Henrik taught Rachel a few simple Norwegian phrases that made her giggle.
all.zh: 亨利克教瑞秋幾句簡單的挪威語，讓她忍不住咯咯笑。

all.en: She helped him reply to a text message from his granddaughter in Oslo.
all.zh: 她幫他回覆來自奧斯陸的孫女傳來的訊息。

all.en: By the time their flight finally boarded, they had exchanged email addresses.
all.zh: 當他們的班機終於開始登機時，兩人已經交換了電子郵件。

all.en: On the plane, the captain announced that the aurora forecast for Iceland was strong.
all.zh: 在飛機上，機長宣布冰島的極光預報指數很強。

all.en: Rachel pressed her face against the cold window once the cabin lights dimmed.
all.zh: 客艙燈光調暗後，瑞秋將臉貼在冰冷的窗戶上。

all.en: Green ribbons of light slowly waved across the dark sky above the clouds.
all.zh: 綠色的光帶在雲層上方的夜空中緩緩飄舞。

all.en: Henrik watched with her, whispering that his wife would have loved this view.
all.zh: 亨利克陪她一起觀賞，輕聲說他的妻子一定會喜歡這片景色。

all.en: Rachel quietly took a long exposure photograph through the window for him.
all.zh: 瑞秋默默地透過窗戶為他拍下一張長時間曝光的照片。

all.en: After landing, they walked together through customs in the quiet early hours.
all.zh: 降落後，他們在清晨寂靜的時分一起穿過海關。

all.en: Their hotels were in opposite directions, so they hugged warmly at the taxi stand.
all.zh: 他們的飯店在不同方向，因此在計程車站親切擁抱道別。

all.en: Throughout the workshop, Rachel often thought about her unexpected new friend.
all.zh: 在整個工作坊期間，瑞秋常常想起這位意外結識的新朋友。

all.en: She mailed him a printed copy of the aurora photo two weeks after returning home.
all.zh: 回國兩週後，她寄了一張極光照片的沖印版給他。

all.en: Henrik wrote back with photos of a fjord and a recipe for cinnamon bread.
all.zh: 亨利克回信附上一張峽灣照片和一份肉桂麵包的食譜。

all.en: They began trading letters every few months across the great northern distance.
all.zh: 他們開始每隔幾個月在遙遠的北方距離間互通書信。

all.en: He told her about his garden and his slow morning walks beside the harbor.
all.zh: 他告訴她關於他的花園，以及在港邊悠閒的晨間漫步。

all.en: She wrote about her exhibitions, her tiny kitchen, and her stubborn black cat.
all.zh: 她則寫下自己的展覽、小小的廚房，與那隻倔強的黑貓。

all.en: Rachel realized the delayed flight had been one of the luckiest moments of her life.
all.zh: 瑞秋意識到那次航班延誤竟是她人生中最幸運的時刻之一。

all.en: Two years later, Henrik invited her to visit his hometown along the Norwegian coast.
all.zh: 兩年後，亨利克邀請她到他位於挪威海岸的家鄉做客。

all.en: She accepted immediately and started planning the trip the very same evening.
all.zh: 她立刻答應，並在當天晚上就開始規劃這趟旅程。

all.en: Sometimes, she thought, the best journeys are the ones that begin with a delay.
all.zh: 她心想，有時候最美好的旅程，正是從一次延誤開始的。

all.en: She booked her tickets to Bergen for the middle of the following summer.
all.zh: 她預訂了隔年仲夏前往卑爾根的機票。

all.en: Henrik wrote back insisting that she stay in the small guest room overlooking the bay.
all.zh: 亨利克回信堅持要她住進他家那間可以俯瞰海灣的小客房。

all.en: Rachel arrived to find a hand-drawn map of the village taped neatly to the fridge.
all.zh: 瑞秋抵達時，發現一張手繪的村莊地圖整齊地貼在冰箱上。

all.en: He led her along the harbor and introduced her to several old fishermen with weathered faces.
all.zh: 他帶著她沿著港邊走，向她介紹幾位面容飽經風霜的老漁夫。

all.en: Each of them smiled politely and asked, in careful English, about Taiwan.
all.zh: 他們每個人都禮貌地微笑，用小心翼翼的英文詢問關於台灣的事。

all.en: Rachel photographed weather-beaten boats and a lone seagull resting on a wooden post.
all.zh: 瑞秋拍下飽經風霜的漁船，以及一隻獨自停在木樁上的海鷗。

all.en: Henrik prepared cinnamon bread and a bowl of fish stew for their first dinner together.
all.zh: 亨利克準備了肉桂麵包與一鍋魚湯，作為他們一起的第一頓晚餐。

all.en: After dinner, his granddaughter video-called and excitedly waved hello from her dorm.
all.zh: 晚餐後，他的孫女打視訊電話來，興奮地從宿舍裡揮手打招呼。

all.en: Rachel realized she now had two homes scattered across very different parts of the world.
all.zh: 瑞秋意識到她如今在世界上非常不同的角落擁有了兩個家。

all.en: Before leaving, she promised Henrik that she would return every other summer for as long as possible.
all.zh: 離開前，她答應亨利克只要還能成行，每隔一年的夏天她都會回來探望。
